description: Use this API to return complex positive and zero sequence parameters for non-transformer branches, and complex positive sequence parameters for transformer branches. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = brndt2(ibus,jbus,ickt,string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the branch quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Branch resistance and reactance in per unit.
Admittance of line shunt at IBUS end of the branch.
Admittance of line shunt at JBUS end of the branch.
Zero sequence branch resistance and reactance (not valid for transformers).
Zero sequence admittance of line shunt at IBUS end of the branch (not valid for transformers).
Zero sequence admittance of line shunt at JBUS end of the branch (not valid for transformers).
Branch losses in MW and Mvar.
Branch losses in units determined by the power output option setting.

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Branch not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Invalid value of ‘STRING’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
‘BRNDT2’ invalid with multisection line identifier; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Sequence data not in case; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
‘BRNDT2’ zero sequence parameter invalid for transformer; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
